description_long: This is an electric bass guitar with a striking metallic blue finish and a contoured double-cutaway body, reminiscent of classic Rickenbacker designs. The body features a chrome bridge, two large pickups, and four control knobs, all set on a silver pickguard. The neck is long and slender, with a dark rosewood fretboard and white dot inlays, leading to a headstock with four tuning pegs arranged in a 2+2 configuration. The back of the guitar reveals a solid blue finish with a pronounced body contour for comfort. The hardware, including the bridge, pickups, and tuning pegs, is metallic, adding to the instrument's robust and professional appearance. This guitar is designed for performance and would be a visually striking and functional instrument in any urban music setting.
description: A metallic blue electric bass guitar with a contoured body, chrome hardware, and a long neck with a rosewood fretboard and four tuning pegs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the metallic blue body, chrome bridge, two pickups, four control knobs, and the full length of the neck with dot inlays.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the body contours, thickness, and the arrangement of the pickups and control knobs.
description_view_2: Side profile displaying the slimness of the neck and the contoured back of the blue body.
description_view_3: Rear angled view emphasizing the back contour, the blue finish, and the headstock's tuning peg arrangement.
attribute_headstock_design: Distinctive 2+2 tuning peg layout, slightly curved top edge, no visible logo
